Package player

Class Player

java.lang.Object
player.Player
public class Player extends Object
Player class

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player()
    Default player constructor, argumentless method that give PlayerN as name with N the number total of player

    Constructor function, build the player with a score = 0.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      Constructor function, build the player with a score = 0.
      Parameters:
      name - Name given to the player

    • Player

      public Player()
      Default player constructor, argumentless method that give PlayerN as name with N the number total of player

  • Method Details

    • display

      public void display()
      Display function of player object The function display the name and the score of the player in the terminal. Allowing the player to know his score.

    • updateScore

      public void updateScore(int value)
      update the player score
      Parameters:
      value - positive or negative value which is added to the score

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Redefinition of the player toString methode, now print name : score pt(s)
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Redefinition of the equals function for Player object. It return True if the parameter and the caller are both Player instance with same name.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - generical object
      Returns:
      Boolean value True if the parameter and the caller are both Player instance with same name else false.

    • getNumberOfPlayer

      public static int getNumberOfPlayer()
      Static method that return the total number of player initialized
      Returns:
      return an integer that is the number of player initialized

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Function that return the name of the player
      Returns:
      String : name given to the player

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Function that return the score of the player
      Returns:
      Integer : score of the player
